mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT sr.customer_id, sr.dept_id FROM t_stock_record sr WHERE GROUP BY sr.customer_id, sr.dept_id ) summary

SELECT sr.customer_id AS customerId, MAX(sr.customer_name) AS customerName, sr.dept_id AS deptId, MAX(sr.dept_code) AS groupCode, COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(sr.goods_id, ':', COALESCE(sr.sku_id, 0))) AS goodsKinds, SUM(sr.change_qty) AS totalQuantity, MAX(sr.biz_date) AS lastOutboundDate FROM t_stock_record sr WHERE GROUP BY sr.customer_id, sr.dept_id ORDER BY lastOutboundDate DESC, customerId DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT sr.customer_id, sr.dept_id, sr.goods_id, sr.sku_id, sr.stock_type_id FROM t_stock_record sr WHERE GROUP BY sr.customer_id, sr.dept_id, sr.goods_id, sr.sku_id, sr.stock_type_id ) goods_summary

SELECT sr.customer_id AS customerId, MAX(sr.customer_name) AS customerName, sr.dept_id AS deptId, MAX(sr.dept_code) AS groupCode, sr.goods_id AS goodsId, MAX(sr.goods_name) AS goodsName, sr.sku_id AS skuId, MAX(sr.sku_code) AS skuCode, sr.stock_type_id AS stockTypeId, MAX(sr.stock_type_name) AS stockTypeName, SUM(sr.change_qty) AS quantity, MAX(sr.biz_date) AS lastOutboundDate FROM t_stock_record sr WHERE GROUP BY sr.customer_id, sr.dept_id, sr.goods_id, sr.sku_id, sr.stock_type_id ORDER BY lastOutboundDate DESC, goodsId DESC, skuId DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_stock_record sr WHERE

SELECT sr.id AS recordId, sr.biz_no AS bizNo, sr.order_id AS orderId, sr.order_item_id AS orderItemId, sr.customer_id AS customerId, sr.customer_name AS customerName, sr.dept_id AS deptId, sr.dept_code AS groupCode, sr.goods_id AS goodsId, sr.goods_name AS goodsName, sr.sku_id AS skuId, sr.sku_code AS skuCode, sr.stock_type_id AS stockTypeId, sr.stock_type_name AS stockTypeName, sr.change_qty AS quantity, sr.biz_date AS outboundDate, sr.operator_id AS operatorId, sr.operator_name AS operatorName FROM t_stock_record sr WHERE ORDER BY sr.biz_date DESC, sr.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
